articles.title: Minnesota Wild Acquires Forward Nick Foligno from the Chicago Blackhawks - NHL.com
articles.description:
SAINT PAUL, Minn. - Minnesota Wild President of Hockey Operations and General Manager Bill Guerin today announced the National Hockey League (NHL) club has acquired forward Nick Foligno from the Chicago Blackhawks in exchange for future considerations.
Folign…

articles.description: Miami (Ohio) finished the regular season as the only unbeaten team in Division I men's basketball, winning 110-108 in overtime over Ohio on Friday night.
